primary_colors: warm earth tones, terracotta, caramel brown, warm beige, sand
design_context.lighting_mood: warm ambient lighting, 2700K color temperature, soft textiles, cozy atmosphere, layered lighting
design_context.overall_description: Warm Earth color palette. Cozy & Warm atmosphere.

62b23017-dbdc-4ff0-9412-47b896396875.generated_prompt: A stunning 3D interior visualization render captures a modern master bedroom, bathed in the warm embrace of 2700K ambient lighting, creating a cozy and inviting atmosphere. The cinematic camera perspective, positioned at eye-level from the doorway looking inwards, reveals a well-composed scene with excellent depth of field. The walls are finished in a smooth, warm beige polished concrete, providing a matte and sophisticated backdrop. A King Bed, upholstered in a caramel brown linen fabric with subtle texture, dominates the center, positioned against the back wall, leaving comfortable circulation paths. The bedding is a careful arrangement of sand-colored organic cotton sheets and a terracotta throw blanket, rich in natural fibers and soft to the touch. On either side of the bed, minimalist nightstands crafted from clear tempered glass with clean, geometric lines reflect the ambient light softly, each holding a ceramic table lamp with a warm matte finish in a muted terracotta hue, casting soft, layered light. The floor is covered in large format, sand-colored polished concrete tiles, offering a seamless and expansive feel. Global illumination ensures soft, even light distribution, while subtle ambient occlusion deepens the shadows in corners and under furniture, enhancing realism. The clean geometry of the room, precise textures, and volumetric lighting contribute to a high-end 3D architectural rendering, emphasizing the warm earth tones and modern, uncluttered aesthetic.
